title: [Bug]: HTTP sink NGINX e2e runner should wait briefly for copied request evidence
summary: The HTTP sink NGINX e2e runner can fail immediately when copying request evidence even though the capture file appears in the container shortly afterward.
observed: The live runner received HTTP 202 responses but docker cp reported that /var/lib/nats-sinks-http/requests.jsonl was missing. Inspecting the preserved container a few seconds later showed the evidence file present.
expected: The runner should retry the bounded evidence copy briefly before failing so normal container filesystem visibility delay does not create a false negative.
reproduction: Run python scripts/run-http-sink-nginx-e2e.py --timeout-seconds 30 --preserve-artifacts on the issue #344 branch after the capture-directory permission fix and before adding evidence-copy retries.
failing_test: tests/unit/test_http_nginx_test_container.py should prove copy_capture_file retries a transient docker cp failure and succeeds when a later attempt can copy the evidence file.
impact: The defect can make the local HTTP sink container e2e test flaky. It does not affect production JetStream ACK behavior or HTTP sink delivery semantics.
delivery_semantics: The runner verifies evidence after sink writes complete. A transient docker cp failure does not change production ACK behavior because the core runner is not involved in this local test harness.
security: Retries must stay bounded, keep container identifiers redacted, and avoid logging payloads, private endpoints, credentials, or local paths in public evidence.
acceptance: copy_capture_file retries a transient copy failure for a bounded short interval.
A focused unit test proves transient copy failure handling without Docker.
python scripts/run-http-sink-nginx-e2e.py --timeout-seconds 120 passes against the local Docker backend.
Sanitized failing and passing test evidence is posted to the GitHub bug report.
tests: Run python -m pytest tests/unit/test_http_nginx_test_container.py -q, scripts/check-sinks.sh, scripts/check.sh, and python scripts/run-http-sink-nginx-e2e.py --timeout-seconds 120.
documentation: No public documentation change is required unless the runner command contract changes.
closeout: Mark completed after the focused regression test and live Docker e2e runner pass, then merge the fix back into the issue #344 feature branch.
